import { toTrustSmartAccount } from 'permissionless/accounts' // [!code focus]
import { client } from './client.js'
import { owner } from './owner.js'

const account = await toTrustSmartAccount({ // [!code focus]

  owner: owner, // [!code focus]
}) // [!code focus]
